name: Funny Face Caramel Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert sticks into bottom of apples.
2. In a quart glass measure, cook unswrapped caramels and 2 tablespoons water on high for 3 to 4 minutes until melted, stirring halfway through.
3. Dip apples in caramel, using a spoon to coat completely.
4. Place on wax paper lined plate.
5. Make faces with candy or sprinkles.
6. Freeze for 15 minutes.
7. Serve immediately or refrigerate. Makes 4 servings.
